title: Opening for Logistics Manager at Speed Post India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Logistics Manager at Speed Post India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Speed Post India! We are hiring a Logistics Manager for our Patna team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Speed Post India:
Speed Post India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Speed Post India!
